scenarios.description: Creating a task persists it and returns the new task with an id
scenarios.acceptance: POST /tasks returns 201 with a valid task object containing an id

scenarios.description: Marking a task complete changes its status to done
scenarios.acceptance: PATCH /tasks/:id with status=done returns the updated task

scenarios.description: Listing tasks supports filtering by project, status, and assignee
Projects can be created and listed
scenarios.acceptance: POST /projects creates a project; GET /projects includes the new project

scenarios.description: Managers can identify overloaded team members and rebalance assigned work
scenarios.acceptance: GET /workload returns utilization and overload status for each team member

scenarios.description: Utilization can be filtered by team member and reporting period
scenarios.acceptance: GET /workload?period=current returns capacity, assigned hours, and utilization percent

scenarios.description: KPI dashboard renders target, actual value, and status for team and project metrics
scenarios.acceptance: GET /kpis returns metrics with target comparison and status

scenarios.description: Role-based access protects management views from unauthorized users
scenarios.acceptance: Team members can see assigned work; only managers/admins can see all workload and KPI reports
